overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dusty suburban shantytown on the outskirts of Night City. The player walks along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and dilapidated buildings, passing dumpsters, food stalls, and NPCs, with a large concrete overpass visible in the distance against a mountainous backdrop.

approach intersection and begin crossing the road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the road from left to right

wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
dusty brown mountain range forming the horizon backdrop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a dusty suburban sidewalk. The player passes a large green dumpster and cardboard boxes while a black sedan drives by on the adjacent road. Palm trees line the left side of the street, and mountains are visible in the hazy distance as the player approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with utility infrastructure and overpass view

events.description: finish crossing street and continue on opposite sidewalk
slight right turn to follow the curving sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down sidewalk past black utility box and approaching food stall area

massive concrete highway overpass with multiple support columns spanning the area
teal colored residential building with american flag hanging near entrance
tall billboard support structure with red digital display facing the street

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the player walks along the opposite sidewalk passing a large black utility box. A teal house with an American flag appears on the right, while a massive concrete overpass dominates the distant view. The camera follows the curving sidewalk as it approaches a food stall area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor food stall with colorful umbrella and outdoor seating

camera pans upward to look at the sun and building rooftops

agents.ego_description: walking past food stall and looking around at surroundings and nearby NPCs

large man in white tank top walking ahead on the sidewalk

motorcycle parked under the umbrella next to the seating area

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a food stall with a colorful umbrella and neon lighting. A woman in purple pants walks toward the camera while a large man in a tank top walks ahead. The camera pans upward to look at the bright sun glaring over the building rooftops, revealing the dusty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching highway overpass with distant city skyline

events.description: camera turns back to face forward after looking up at the sun
passing parked blue truck and cars near the overpass entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing down sidewalk toward the overpass, passing parked vehicles and other pedestrians

entered.detail: large blue industrial truck with multiple wheels parked on the roadside
distant futuristic city skyline with tall glass towers visible through the haze
white wooden picket fence running along the property line

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to face forward, continuing down the street toward the massive overpass. A blue military truck is parked on the right, and the distant futuristic skyline of Night City is visible through the haze. The player approaches the overpass entrance as the large man runs ahead toward the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a dusty suburban shantytown that transitions from a roadside path into a more developed residential and commercial area. It begins along a sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing a green dumpster and cardboard boxes as a black sedan drives by against a backdrop of hazy, distant mountains. As the camera crosses an intersection, the perspective shifts to the opposite sidewalk, moving past a large black utility box. The scene then opens up to reveal a teal house adorned with an American flag on the right, while a massive concrete overpass begins to dominate the horizon. Finally, the camera follows the curving path as it leads toward a cluster of food stalls.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dusty suburban street that transitions from a crowded sidewalk into a wide view of a massive concrete overpass. It begins by approaching a colorful food stall with neon lighting, passing a woman in purple pants and a man in a tank top. As the camera pans upward, the bright sun glares over the building rooftops, highlighting the thick, dusty atmosphere of the shantytown. The view then shifts back forward to continue down the street, passing a parked blue military truck while the futuristic skyline of Night City emerges through the haze. Finally, the camera advances toward the entrance of the looming overpass as the man runs ahead into the distance.
